cmd:
sed -i 's/import (/import (
	"path"
	/g' /app/app/middleware.go && sed -i '/if strings\.Prefix/{s|if strings\.HasPrefix(r\.URL\.Path, "/api/")|cleanPath := path.Clean(r.URL.Path)
	if !strings.HasPrefix(cleanPath, "/") {
		cleanPath = "/" + cleanPath
	}
	if strings.HasPrefix(cleanPath, "/api/")|' /app/app/middleware.go
